betterquesting:10.desc:8:
One thing you can do before diving into progression — and something worth doing whenever you have the time — is §6looting structures§f.

§cYou shouldn’t rely entirely on structures for resources§f, §abut they provide a strong head-start§f when progressing through both the §bmod§f and the §bmodpack§f.

§aHere’s a list of structures that are especially worth raiding in the early game§f:

§9Antennas§f: Common structures containing modest loot, mainly §9steel ingots§f, §9wires§f, and §9analog circuits§f.

§9Radio Stations§f: Excellent sources of §9concrete§f and §9steel§f. The smaller side building often contains §9diesel-filled tanks§f.  
Chests may also hold §9revolvers§f and occasionally §9weaker shotguns§f — both far better alternatives to a vanilla bow.

§9Relay Stations§f: Large antenna-like structures with §9massive amounts of steel§f.  
§bSteel armor is only slightly better than iron§f, but the sheer quantity available here lets you §aquickly move into steel tools and machines§f.

§9Crashed Spaceships§f: Somewhat §6rare§f and often §bfilled with items not immediately useful§f early on.  
However, they still contain §9large amounts of steel§f and usually a §6chest of rare items§f — most commonly §9consumables§f and §9rocket launchers§f.

§9Crashed Vertibirds§f: Desert-buried helicopters that act as a §9solid steel source§f and §9often contain power armor parts§f.

§9Factories§f: Large brick structures packed with §9machines§f and §9chests full of raw materials§f.

§cWarning§f: §4Beware of Corrupted Broadcasters§f. These structures are §cnot easily visible§f and emit §4extremely dangerous signals§f.  
§cGetting too close can quickly kill you§f, even before you realize what you’re standing near. Always approach unfamiliar antenna-like structures with §ewarning and distance§f.
betterquesting:10.name:8: Things to do before you start
